headline: Norfolk Southern: A Steady Quarter, Amid Ongoing M&A Talks
summary: Norfolk Southern Corporation is rated Hold with shares trading near fair value at $291 versus a fair price of $293. Read more on NSC stock here.

headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock with Competitive Advantages and 2 We Avoid
summary: Generating cash is essential for any business, but not all cash-rich companies are great investments. Some produce plenty of cash but fail to allocate it effectively, leading to missed opportunities.
